name: Agoralpulse
description:
What Agoralpulse Does

Agorapulse is a social media marketing and CRM software platform. It features  basic and advanced post-scheduling tools. 

The Agorapulse platform helps you maximize your LinkedIn presencs by scheduling, publishing content, and managing interactions. You can also use the tools for other social platforms. Plus, an award-winning support provides fast and friendly responses to queries.

Source: Agorapulse 

Key Features

  • Features to manage and coordinate LinkedIn posting including those for:some text
    • Content planning/scheduling
    • Content visibility in the publishing calendar
    • Tracking and analyzing your LinkedIn post performance.
  • Automated posts some text
    • Schedule posts in advance 
    • Schedule in bulk. 
  • An automatic unified inbox assistant manages repetitive tasks 
  • Cross-platform compatibility - Support for other major social media sites.
  • Analytics to track post performance. 
  • Social listening features provide insights into your customers’ sentiments 
  • A unified dashboard 
  • Mobile app to manage tasks on the go.
  • Award-winning support. 

Benefits of Agoralpulse

Agorapulse is a social media management platform with benefits such as: 

  • Manage and coordinate LinkedIn posting:some text
    • Content planning and scheduling
    • Keep track of content in the publishing calendar
    • Moderate and manage comments 
    • Track and analyze LinkedIn parameters to identify areas for growth  
  • Collect all your social media messages in one place with the unified social inbox. 
  • Measure performance with analytics.
  • Manage social media tasks anytime, anywhere with the mobile app 
  • Enjoy outstanding customer support.

Pricing

Four plans are available: 

  • Standerd: 49 Euro/month
  • Professional: 79 Euro /month  
  • Advance: 119 Euro/month  
  • Custom: Customized price

Pros

✅Features to manage and coordinate LinkedIn posting

✅Centralized social media management 

✅Unified social media inbox

✅Award-winning customer support

Cons

🚫Feature limitations for some social media platforms

🚫Occasional posting failures on LinkedIn
